title: Lemon Dressing
cScaleSummary: C0 because the recipe contains no animal-derived ingredients that contribute cholesterol. The olive oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, garlic, mustard powder, salt, and pepper all contribute 0 mg cholesterol.
ldlActiveSummary: LDL-Active because the dressing is built from unsaturated olive oil and lemon, with flavor developed through acid, garlic, and mustard rather than saturated fat. It is light, plant-based, and supportive of LDL-friendly meals.
intro: A bright, olive oil–based lemon dressing that cuts through richness without adding weight. Built to behave like a vinaigrette, it brings sharpness, balance, and a subtle savory backbone from garlic and mustard.

stepGroups.title: Instructions
items: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl.
Let sit 10–15 minutes to soften the garlic and allow flavors to integrate.
Taste and adjust salt if needed.
